title: The Time Vortex (TARDIS)
description: This is a TARDIS mod done differently
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dc5e864c940661acca0429230fa1780e661fe33.png)

In this TARDIS mod you start from the bare bones and build a TARDIS from scratch. You slowly upgrade it with modules that allow dimensional travel, saving locations, easier methods of setting your target, player blacklisting, etc. You can eventually make your TARDIS bigger on the inside with an 11D upgrade. This mod also has support for computer craft on the interface and you can fully control the TARDIS using a computer. Please give me any feedback or suggestions that you think of in the discord, don't worry about my feelings, just worry about what needs to change.

Credit to DALLE 3 for the logo and title image, if you're an artist who is willing to do the logo/title image for less than the price of a car please message me on discord (kingusbergronteepleplop) <3

Wiki: https://github.com/Plaaasma/TimeVortexMod/wiki

Discord: https://discord.gg/MEnPTEtQYX

**Currently INCOMPATIBLE with "YUNG's Better End Island" and "Deeper and Darker"**
